title: Find Duplicate Values in MySQL
summary: Return repeated non-null values in one MySQL column with GROUP BY and HAVING.
verification_setup: Ensure mysql, mysqladmin, and mysqld are available on PATH.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 and MySQL 8.4.0 on macOS. The tests start a temporary MySQL instance with local mysql binaries, then verify duplicate counts, exclusion of unique values, NULL filtering, result ordering, and empty-result behavior.
